briefdescription.para: This function returns the device descriptor for the device.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the configuration descriptor for the device.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a string descriptor for the given index.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.
is the index of the string for which the descriptor is requested.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

briefdescription.para: This function handles a "set configuration" request.

detaileddescription.para: Changes State of Core to USB configured State.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the Index of the desired configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when SET_CONFIGURATION command is received from Host.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the setup packet received from Host.

simplesect.para: Non control endpoints must be enabled after SET_CONFIGURATION command since hardware clears all previously enabled endpoints except control endpoints when this command is received.

briefdescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when SET_CONFIGURATION command or SET_INTERFACE command is received from Host.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the setup packet received from Host.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the storage specific chapter 9 code for the example.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a wgr 10/10/10 First release 2.5 pm 02/20/20 Added SetConfigurationApp and SetInterfaceHandler API to make ch9 common framework to all example. 2.10 ka 08/21/25 Fixed GCC warnings *
